sections.note: Sub-sections faithfully reproduce the three h4/p blocks. Image is the first of three stacked mockups; live actually shows three images stacked but only one was extracted - acceptable simplification.

audit.summary: Extraction is faithful to the live page. All five sections (hero, pain-points, two feature-splits with sub-sections, and final CTA) reproduce live content accurately. Minor note: the third feature-split on live shows three stacked screenshot images, but only the primary one is referenced — acceptable for a single imageSrc field.
